title: AB PM-JAY Official Overview (NHA)
summary: Official PM-JAY reference summary compiled from National Health Authority publications and PM-JAY official portal pages.
content:
## Source
- National Health Authority (NHA), Hospital Empanelment Guidelines (July 2024): https://nha.gov.in/img/resources/12-July-24_Hospital-Empanelment-Guidelines-July-22.pdf

## Official Scheme Facts
- Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY was launched in September 2018.
- PM-JAY targets the bottom 40 percent of the population based on SECC 2011 deprivation and occupational criteria.
- The scheme provides health coverage up to INR 5,00,000 per eligible family per year for secondary and tertiary care.
- Service delivery is through a network of public and empaneled private hospitals.

## Source Guidance
Use this document only for high-level official PM-JAY scheme facts. For implementation details, refer to cited official guidelines.

title: AB PM-JAY Hospital Empanelment Highlights (Official)
summary: Official reference highlights for PM-JAY hospital empanelment from NHA guidelines.
content:
## Source
- NHA Hospital Empanelment Guidelines (July 2024): https://nha.gov.in/img/resources/12-July-24_Hospital-Empanelment-Guidelines-July-22.pdf

## Empanelment Reference Points
- The guideline describes empanelment principles for public and private hospitals under PM-JAY.
- It details institutional roles, including committees and verification responsibilities.
- It emphasizes quality access, compliance checks, and service-network governance.
- It outlines administrative processes used by implementing agencies for empanelment lifecycle management.

## Source Guidance
Use this document for official empanelment context and governance-level understanding, not for local hospital-specific SOP decisions unless validated against current state implementation notifications.
